summary: This is an extremely brief post that simply links to an Inc.com article where Joel shared travel tips from his World Tour. The post promises advice on avoiding air travel problems and details about equipment used. There is essentially no substantive content in the blog post itself, as it serves purely as a pointer to external content.
key_points: Joel conducted a 'World Tour' involving significant travel
He published detailed travel tips through Inc.com rather than his own blog
The tips covered avoiding air travel problems and equipment recommendations
money_quotes: You'll learn how we completely avoided air travel snafus, what equipment we brought along, and more.
key_insight: This is a brief link post pointing readers to Joel's travel tips published on Inc.com, with no substantive content of its own.
